skill.name: agent-orchestration-multi-agent-optimize
skill.description: Optimize multi-agent systems with coordinated profiling, workload distribution, and cost-aware orchestration. Use when improving agent performance, throughput, or reliability.
skill.summary: Multi-agent optimization toolkit for profiling, orchestration, and cost management.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 18 static analysis findings are false positives. The file is documentation-only (SKILL.md) containing Python code examples in markdown blocks. The static analyzer incorrectly identified markdown code fences as Ruby shell execution and misread documentation text as weak cryptography. No executable code, network calls, or dangerous patterns exist.

content.user_title: Optimize Multi-Agent Systems for Peak Performance
content.value_statement: Multi-agent workflows often suffer from coordination bottlenecks and unmanaged costs. This skill provides profiling, orchestration strategies, and cost controls to maximize efficiency.
actual_capabilities: Profile multi-agent workloads to identify bottlenecks across database, application, and frontend layers
Implement context window optimization with semantic compression and token budget management
Design parallel execution strategies using coordinated agent orchestration
Track and optimize LLM costs through adaptive model selection and caching
Reduce latency through predictive caching and intelligent result memoization
Establish monitoring frameworks for continuous performance improvement
limitations: Requires existing multi-agent infrastructure to optimize
Depends on measurable metrics and evaluation data for baseline comparison
Cost optimization requires accurate token usage tracking from your LLM provider
Performance gains vary based on system architecture and workload characteristics

use_cases.title: E-commerce Platform Optimization
use_cases.description: Profile and optimize a multi-agent system handling product recommendations, inventory management, and customer service for an e-commerce platform.
use_cases.target_user: Backend engineers managing AI-powered e-commerce systems

use_cases.title: Enterprise API Performance Enhancement
use_cases.description: Analyze and improve multi-layered agent orchestration for enterprise APIs with high throughput requirements.
use_cases.target_user: DevOps engineers optimizing enterprise AI infrastructure

use_cases.title: Cost Reduction for AI Workflows
use_cases.description: Implement cost controls and adaptive model selection to reduce LLM expenses while maintaining quality thresholds.
use_cases.target_user: Engineering managers controlling AI infrastructure budgets

prompt_templates.title: Quick Performance Assessment
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze my multi-agent system and identify the top 3 bottlenecks affecting throughput. Current setup: [describe agents and their roles]. Target metrics: [specify goals].

prompt_templates.title: Orchestration Strategy Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design an orchestration strategy for my multi-agent workflow. Agents involved: [list agents]. Constraints: [budget, latency, quality requirements]. Provide parallel execution plan and fallback strategies.
prompt_templates.scenario: Designing coordination for a new multi-agent system

prompt_templates.title: Cost Optimization Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my agent token usage and recommend cost optimization strategies. Current monthly spend: [amount]. Agents and their functions: [details]. Quality thresholds: [requirements]. Suggest model selection and caching strategies.
prompt_templates.scenario: Reducing LLM costs while maintaining output quality

prompt_templates.title: End-to-End Performance Tuning
prompt_templates.prompt: Conduct comprehensive optimization of my multi-agent system. Baseline metrics: [provide current performance data]. Target improvements: [specific goals]. Constraints: [budget, timeline, quality]. Deliver profiling results, orchestration changes, and rollback plan.
prompt_templates.scenario: Full performance engineering engagement with measurable targets

output_examples.input: Profile a 3-agent system for e-commerce recommendations
output_examples.output: Profiling identified Database Agent as primary bottleneck (avg 450ms query time). Application Agent shows efficient CPU usage (12%). Frontend Agent has render delays during peak traffic. Recommended: Add database indexing, implement query caching, defer non-critical frontend updates.

output_examples.input: Optimize costs for customer service agent cluster
output_examples.output: Cost analysis: 68% of tokens used by complex reasoning agent. Recommendation: Route simple queries to Haiku (saves 83%), reserve Sonnet for complex cases. Implement response caching for FAQs. Projected savings: 52% monthly cost reduction.

output_examples.input: Design parallel orchestration for data processing pipeline
output_examples.output: Orchestration plan: 4 parallel agents (validation, enrichment, transformation, storage). Thread pool executor with 8 workers. Fault tolerance: retry failed agents 2x, checkpoint after each stage. Expected throughput: 3.2x improvement over sequential execution.

best_practices: Always establish baseline metrics before optimization to measure improvement accurately
Implement gradual rollouts with rollback capability to prevent system-wide regressions
Balance performance gains against resource consumption and maintain system stability
anti_patterns: Deploying orchestration changes without regression testing and validation
Optimizing for speed at the expense of quality thresholds and acceptable margins
Making irreversible changes without measuring before-and-after performance

faq.question: What types of systems can this skill optimize?
faq.answer: This skill works with any multi-agent system including AI workflows, distributed processing pipelines, microservices with AI components, and automated task orchestration systems.

faq.question: Do I need existing performance monitoring in place?
faq.answer: While helpful, existing monitoring is not required. The skill includes profiling agents that can establish baselines from scratch. However, having metrics available speeds up the optimization process.

faq.question: How are cost optimizations implemented without breaking quality?
faq.answer: Cost strategies use adaptive model selection based on task complexity, caching for repeated queries, and token budget management. Quality thresholds are defined upfront and all optimizations respect those boundaries.

faq.question: Can this skill optimize single-agent systems?
faq.answer: This skill is specifically designed for multi-agent coordination. For single-agent optimization, consider prompt tuning or model selection skills. However, cost and context optimization techniques may still apply.

faq.question: What happens if optimization makes performance worse?
faq.answer: The skill emphasizes gradual, reversible changes with rollback plans. Baseline metrics enable detection of regressions. All changes should be validated with repeatable tests before full deployment.

faq.question: Does this work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. The orchestration strategies and cost optimization techniques work across all supported AI platforms.
